summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Signal editorial discovery platform. Homepage, navigation, search, mobile menu, and forms tested. Navigation works but theme toggle has issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Theme toggle button found but doesn't change theme state

design_issues.issue: Next.js Image components missing 'sizes' prop causing performance warnings
affected_components: All images using Next.js Image with fill prop

design_issues.issue: React DevTools development warning in console

passed_tests: Homepage loads successfully with hero section and stats
Search overlay opens, accepts input, returns results, and closes
All navigation pages exist and load correctly via direct URL
Mobile menu opens and displays all navigation items with collapsible Tools section
Tools dropdown appears on hover in desktop view
All Tools category pages load successfully (/tools/ai, /tools/calculators, etc.)
Individual detail pages work (topics/artificial-intelligence, collections/ai-engineering-essentials, articles/rise-of-autonomous-ai-agents)
Navigation links work properly (clicking Discover navigates to /discover page)
Premium dark-first design with elegant spacing and typography visible
Responsive design works on mobile viewport
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix theme toggle functionality - button is found but doesn't change theme state. Add sizes prop to Next.js Image components to resolve performance warnings.
success_percentage: frontend: 90% - Most features working correctly, only theme toggle and minor performance optimizations needed
